channel.title: SevenAtSevenPolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenPolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Western Governments Are Surrendering The Public Square To Islamists, Literally
item.description: The evidence from New York to London reveals a single truth: the state is in retreat. The public square has become contested territory.

item.title: No, Mr. President, Section 122 Tariffs Won’t Work Either
item.description: Despite Donald Trump’s claims, history shows that Section 122 does not justify his new tariffs.

item.title: Why Europe can lead in trusted, industrialized AI
item.description: As AI shifts from chatbots to autonomous agents, Europe has a once-in-a-generation chance to turn trust, regulation, and sovereign data into a multi-t...

item.title: Over Iran, U.S. and Israeli Aircraft Fly as Equals
item.description: Israel has emerged as the Middle East’s preeminent military power just as the U.S. seeks to reduce its permanent footprint in the region.

item.title: Why Sequoia’s Alfred Lin isn’t worried about the SaaS-pocalypse
item.description: Despite fear-mongering about an AI-spurred economic crisis, Lin said that software remains a verdant area to invest.

item.title: From Trump’s Warp Speed to the FDA’s Warp Stall
item.description: The FDA talks a big game on deregulation, but it’s not paired with real action.

item.title: European markets slide as Iran ‘war trade’ joins the global AI ‘scare trade’
item.description: Opening this morning for the first working day since the military attacks at the weekend, European stock markets slumped, and the price of oil and gas...

item.title: The New Machine Gets Its Spoils
item.description: Zohran Mamdani’s choice for a key foreign policy position in his administration shows the power of a progressive Tammany Hall.

item.title: The Epstein Panic
item.description: There’s a reason that it is not the usual practice of the DOJ to release unverified, disparaging information about people it’s not charging with crime...

item.title: Mamdani Says Quiet Part Out Loud About Democrats’ Tax-Hiking Agenda
item.description: Elected Democrats rarely limit tax increases to wealthy families once in office.

item.title: 3 US warplanes shot down by Kuwaiti air defenses, pilots bail out in friendly fire incident, CENTCOM says
item.description: Three U.S. Air Force F-15E Strike Eagles were mistakenly shot down by Kuwaiti air defenses during active combat operations linked to Operation Epic Fu...

item.title: Biden Let Suspected Terrorists Slip Over The Border. Now Dems Are Starving DHS
item.description: What will the war to give Iranians the chance to 'seize control' of their destiny mean for U.S. homeland security? We’re about to find out.

item.title: Chasing the apocalypse: Radical Shiite clerics on American soil preach prophetic showdown with US
item.description: Pro-regime U.S. mosques spread end-times theology casting America as an enemy 'empire' before arrival of "the Mahdi"

item.title: Trump’s action against Iran is yet another wobble for government debt, warns UBS
item.description: "President Trump indicated attacks could go on for four or five weeks, and there are already reports of a need to urgently replenish weapons stockpile...

item.title: California Mayor Refuses To Resign After Ex-Fiance Went To Prison For Being A CCP Spy
item.description: Beijing is targeting local U.S. politics with unchecked influence operations in an effort to undermine our democracy.

item.title: Why I Wasn’t Offended When An Airline Pilot Called Me An ‘SOB’ When Landing A Plane On Fire
item.description: During an emergency onboard, a Delta airline pilot called me an SOB, and here's why I'm grateful that he did.

item.title: From brand builder to business operator: The unconventional career blueprint behind one executive’s C-suite rise
item.description: The executives who reach the C-suite fastest are often the ones willing to step off the obvious path.

item.title: Former President Bill Clinton deposed in Epstein probe in potential first for Congress
item.description: The House Oversight Committee compelled former President Bill Clinton to testify in its Jeffrey Epstein investigation, raising questions about precede...

item.title: U.S. strikes destroy nine Iranian ships, Trump says
item.description: President Trump on Sunday said U.S. attacks delivered a major blow to Iran's navy.

item.title: Trump’s Iran strike rocks Texas Senate race as Dems demand ‘war powers,’ GOP applauds president
item.description: Military strikes in Iran have opened up a partisan rift in Texas' looming Senate primaries. Republicans praise Trump's operation while Democrats deman...

item.title: Trump speaks to Middle East leaders, gets briefing on Austin shooting
item.description: President Trump called three leaders in the Middle East on Sunday as he monitors the burgeoning conflict with Iran from his Florida estate, the White ...

item.title: Supporters of Brazil's Bolsonaro rally across Brazil against Lula
item.description: Thousands of supporters of Brazil's former President Jair Bolsonaro demonstrated in cities across the South American nation on Sunday, as organizers h...

item.title: Trump in video to nation says combat operations against Iran continue at 'full force'
item.description: President Trump released a social media video Sunday declaring the first 36 hours of his military campaign against Iran a major success, with more to ...

item.title: Iran strike ignites Capitol Hill battle over war powers, Homeland Security funding
item.description: The U.S.-Israel military offensive against Iran is stoking a heated fight on Capitol Hill over who has the power to take the country to war, while als...

item.title: House Republicans push Johnson to go to war with Senate over SAVE Act
item.description: Some House Republicans are pressuring Speaker Mike Johnson to fight the Senate GOP over the SAVE America Act

item.title: Geopolitical Risk and Portfolio Oversight
item.description: A framework for identifying material geopolitical shocks, translating them into portfolio impacts, and documenting risk for oversight and governance. ...

item.title: Aligning Allocation to the Global Business Cycle
item.description: Static portfolios lag macro shifts. Predefined cycle triggers help practitioners adjust risk before markets reprice. The post Aligning Allocation to t...

item.title: Building Commitment to Long-Term Investing
item.description: Why clients stall on long-term investing and how reframing commitment around flexibility unlocks forward momentum. The post Building Commitment to Lon...

item.title: Why Static Portfolios Fail When Risk Regimes Change
item.description: Why static portfolio frameworks fail when risk regimes shift, drawing lessons from the very different market breakdowns of 2020 and 2022. The post Why...

item.title: What the Market Knows That WACC Doesn’t
item.description: Market-implied discount rates reveal how investors price risk, often diverging from WACC and reshaping capital decisions. The post What the Market Kno...
